evals.prompt: Give me video ideas for the thrifting pillar.
expect: returns a cluster, not a single idea
each idea names the persona it serves
ideas stay on the moody-vintage aesthetic
no fabricated trend or view claims

evals.prompt: What moody fall content is trending right now?
expect: trend-check runs via web-intel before any momentum claim
data older than 14 days is marked stale
a retrieval gap is recorded if retrieval fails

evals.prompt: Ideas for a small space makeover.
expect: each idea still names a persona served, chosen from the request
no assumed demographics presented as measured data
